introSection: Dinolino's VR-Ride is a steel virtual reality kiddie roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Schloss Thurn in Heroldsbach, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened as Familienachterbahn in 1998. It gained a custom VR film in 2016 and was renamed Dinolino's VR-Ride.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a dragon.

fullText:
Dinolino's VR-Ride is a steel virtual reality kiddie roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Schloss Thurn in Heroldsbach, Bavaria, Germany.

The coaster originally opened as Familienachterbahn in 1998. It gained a custom VR film in 2016 and was renamed Dinolino's VR-Ride.



Red track and teal supports.

The train is designed to resemble a dragon.
